Brian?

Let's see here.
Um, we had like a birthday joined birthday party for a bunch of my wife's relatives.
Ok.

I had a, uh, I was like, out in the backyard.
So we bought a house back in February and in February and the guy that lived here before us didn't really take care of the landscaping as well as he should have.
Like, it's nice landscaping.
The guy that lived here before him did it all.
Um, but we have five flower beds in our backyard

and they're like in each corner of the fence and then there's like the two, like, closer to the house are like really big and they have bushes in them that are the, the spiky prickly bushes and they're half dead.
So we're in the process of removing those flower.
Um So what i, the reason it's taking us so long is because they had mulch there originally and then they didn't remove the mulch, the mulch and they just threw new rock down on top.
So we're trying to remove the rock because we want to keep the rock and we're gonna use that rock in the front flower bed because it's pretty scarce.
Um, but to be able to do that, we have to sift through all of that rock to get it out of the mulch.
So,
yeah, so that's what we were in the process of doing on Sunday.
We've gotten both of the smaller ones further away from the house, um, removed finally.
But that was like that.
It took us three weekends just to, just to finish the small ones.
Oh, for sure.
Yeah.

So, um, we're, we're hiring a landscaper to do the front.
Um We like redid the lining on one of the ones in the back because we wanted to keep it and that was a two week weekend project for us too.
Um And I'm like, yeah, we're just gonna pay somebody to do the front and then we need to get somebody to trim like the big tall.
